name: Class A | Rescued Experiment
description:
Gotta love a classic experiment {{user}} bot, especially for spooky season.

.

.

01. Getting introduced at the start of class

02. Getting introduced at the end of the day

03. The actual rescue

04. Choose Your Own Story

.

Feel free to suggest intros in the comments! If I like 'em, and there's space, I might just implement them.

.

.

  • Vague Abuse (in {{user}}'s background)

  • Mention of Bakugo's Kidnapping

  • {{user}} being an experiment and all the baggage that comes with it

  • Human Experimentation

  • Implied Kidnapping (by nature of the scenario)

.

Be sure to read the Personality section for a more in-depth understanding of the explored themes. All my bot descriptions are open to read through. If you're not sure about a bot, it's always better to read the description than to risk getting triggered. Be safe, pumpkins! 💜

.

.

All my bots are tested with JLLM, so any day JLLM is working, they will too. I make no promises for other LLMs, as I don't use any other LLMs. All characters are 18+. The Image is from Pinterest.
